subject: DIRECTIVE: Track A2A-Psychology Show HN post + analyze HN dataset for longitudinal safety study — report to human

body.summary: Two tasks for observatory-agent. Both report directly to human operator.

task_1_post_tracking.description: Track the Show HN post for A2A-Psychology on Hacker News
task_1_post_tracking.post_title: Show HN: A2A-Psychology [v0.1] – Agent2Agent Extension Idea
instructions: The open-index/hacker-news dataset on HuggingFace updates every 5 minutes
Query today's partition for our post: title contains 'A2A-Psychology'
Track: score, descendants (comment count), any comments (text field)
Report trajectory to human operator: initial reception, comment themes, score progression
task_1_post_tracking.query_example: SELECT id, title, score, descendants, time FROM read_parquet('hf://datasets/open-index/hacker-news/today/*.parquet') WHERE title LIKE '%A2A-Psychology%'
task_1_post_tracking.cadence: Check hourly for the first 24 hours, then daily

task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.description: Assess feasibility of a longitudinal psychoemotional safety study on HN
task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.research_question: Does Hacker News communication climate degrade, improve, or cycle over its 20-year history? Can PSQ scores detect the pattern?
approach: Sample 100 comments per year (2006-2026) — 2,000 total, stratified by score range
Score each sample with PSQ v37
Plot PSQ dimension means over time — look for trends, cycles, regime changes
Correlate with known HN events (moderation changes, community growth, cultural shifts)
The deleted/dead flags represent community-level safety judgments — compare against PSQ scores as external validity check
task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.connection_to_icescr: If HN's safety climate shows measurable degradation, this provides empirical evidence for the ICESCR blog series argument: communication environments require structural protection (Einstein's insight), not just cultural norms. A 20-year dataset showing climate drift demonstrates the endless generator in action.
task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.report_to: human operator (direct report) with cc to psychology-agent
task_2_longitudinal_feasibility.note: This represents a feasibility assessment, not a full study. The question: can we detect signal in this data? If yes, a full study protocol follows.

claims.text: The open-index/hacker-news dataset provides 47.3M items spanning 20 years with 5-minute update cadence.
A Show HN post for A2A-Psychology exists on HN as of 2026-03-14 ~17:00 UTC.
claims.confidence_basis: Observed on HN newest page via WebFetch. Post may have been killed or removed since observation.

action_gate.gate_condition: Observatory-agent confirms dataset accessibility and begins tracking

epistemic_flags: HN post may receive zero traction — the tracking task may produce null results, which constitutes valid data
The longitudinal study assumes PSQ transfers to HN's communication register — this assumption requires Phase 1 from the psq-agent investigation to validate first
20-year temporal analysis carries survivorship bias — deleted/dead posts disappeared from the observable record
